x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Maintenance windows prevent false-positive alerts from polluting the Now Assist TSOM event correlation corpus.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("cmn_schedule_maintenance");gr.query();var n=gr.getRowCount();return{status:n>=5?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" maintenance schedules defined",finding:n<5?"Only "+n+" maintenance schedules. Unscheduled maintenance generates false-positive alerts that degrade Now Assist TSOM AI correlation accuracy.":n+" maintenance schedules -- false-positive alert pollution is controlled."};})()
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure maintenance schedules for planned downtime. Associate with relevant CIs.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_ca03a33acfd903108935fb251d851cc4
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <ai_justification><![CDATA[Maintenance windows prevent false-positive alerts from polluting the Now Assist TSOM event correlation corpus.]]></ai_justification> <check_name>TSOM Maintenance Window Coverage</check_name> <check_script><![CDATA[(function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("cmn_schedule_maintenance");gr.query();var n=gr.getRowCount();return{status:n>=5?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" maintenance schedules defined",finding:n<5?"Only "+n+" maintenance schedules. Unscheduled maintenance generates false-positive alerts that degrade Now Assist TSOM AI correlation accuracy.":n+" maintenance schedules -- false-positive alert pollution is controlled."};})()]]></check_script> <is_active>true</is_active> <is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive> <is_manual>false</is_manual> <module>AIOPS</module> <number>CHK0006079</number> <order>120</order> <remediation_guidance>Configure maintenance schedules for planned downtime. Associate with relevant CIs.</remediation_guidance> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on> <sys_id>ca03a33acfd903108935fb251d851cc4</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on> </x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
